card_summary: A single-page clipping from the LA Weekly (Los Angeles, California), dated Thursday, November 22, 1990, page 6. The item is likely a newspaper article or feature related to Philip K. page_summary:
A scanned newspaper page from the LA Weekly (Los Angeles, California), dated Thursday, November 22, 1990, page 6. The clipping was sourced from Newspapers.com and downloaded on April 9, 2025. The PDF text layer contains only source metadata with no recoverable article text.

The LA Weekly was one of the most influential alternative weekly newspapers in the United States. By 1990, eight years after Dick's death, his posthumous reputation was growing rapidly. The release of the Total Recall film adaptation in June 1990 had brought renewed attention to Dick's work, and this November 1990 clipping may relate to continued coverage of Dick's cultural influence in the Los Angeles arts and literary community where he spent his final years.
